siteMessages.heroTitle: Heavy-Duty Mobile Repair in Monroe, WI
siteMessages.heroSubtitle: Emergency roadside and on-site repair for trucks, trailers, equipment, and fleet vehicles across Green County and surrounding areas.
siteMessages.urgentBannerTitle: Truck down? Call Ray's Mobile Repair.
siteMessages.urgentBannerText: For urgent roadside repair, call directly for the fastest response.
siteMessages.serviceAreaText: Proudly serving Monroe, Green County, and surrounding Southern Wisconsin communities. Call to confirm availability for your location.
siteMessages.careersBanner: Ray's Mobile Repair is looking for dependable diesel and heavy-duty repair help.

services.title: Emergency Repairs
services.summary: Roadside and on-site repair for trucks, trailers, equipment, and fleet vehicles.

services.title: Onsite DOT Inspections
services.summary: Help keep your fleet compliant, road-ready, and prepared for inspection requirements.

services.title: Mobile Repair and Maintenance
services.summary: On-site repair and maintenance to reduce downtime and avoid unnecessary trips to the shop.

services.title: Custom Accessory Install
services.summary: Accessory installation for work trucks, trailers, and equipment setups.

services.title: Trailer Repairs
services.summary: Repair support for trailer brakes, lights, suspension, electrical issues, and more.
